title: Intensely Charred Ukrainian Eggs Frittata
description: A monsoon Ukrainian dish featuring free-range eggs and lardons, this frittata is charred to perfection and pillowy on the inside, making it a delicious breakfast option, free from onion and garlic
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large skillet, render the lardons over medium heat until crispy
Remove the lardons from the skillet and set aside
In the same skillet, add the unsalted butter and let it melt
Pour the beaten eggs into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the eggs and stir gently
Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese and chopped fresh dill over the eggs
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes
Remove the skillet from the oven and use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata
Slide the frittata onto a plate and top with the rendered lardons
